payments_info.title: Flexible Payment Options
payments_info.description: At Kyaw Kyar, you can purchase with <highlight>Cash Payment</highlight>, or choose easy <highlight>Showroom Installment</highlight> or low-interest <highlight>Bank Installment</highlight> plans.
payments_info.showroom_details: If you choose showroom installment for {{duration}} months duration, you pay {{initialPayment}}% as initial deposit, and {{paperworkFee}}% of car price for paperwork fee. Then you have to give {{interestRate}}% interest rate on the remaining {{remainingPct}}%.

calculator.title: Installment Calculator
calculator.select_hint: Select an installment type to see calculations.

banks.title: Accepted Banks
banks.description: We accept KBZ / AYA / CB and most local banks.

cta.title: Calculate Your Payment
cta.description_line1: Get a quick estimate for the payment plan that fits you.
cta.description_line2: We’ll also automatically pass your selected mode to the calculator.

hero.title: Installment Options at <brand>Kyaw Kyar</brand>
hero.description: At Kyaw Kyar, you can pay directly at the showroom or make payments through the major banks used by customers.

image_card.subtitle: Showroom / Bank Payment Options
image_card.title: Clear • Fast • Secure
image_card.description: We keep the payment steps clear, fast, and secure for customers.

showroom.title: Showroom Payment
showroom.description: Pay directly at Kyaw Kyar showroom, and our team will assist with paperwork.

benefits.paperwork_desc: Our showroom team helps handle the paperwork.
benefits.clear_payment_desc: A clear payment process with quick support.

bank.title: Bank Payment
bank.description: Make payments through KBZ, AYA, CB, and most customer-used banks.

benefits.accepted_desc: We accept the major banks our customers use.
benefits.secure_desc: A secure and reliable payment process.

purchase_guide.title: Required Documents for Bank Installment
purchase_guide.subtitle: Please bring the following documents for processing.
purchase_guide.bank_approval_note: * The installment process can only proceed after receiving Bank Approval.
